MSME Classification · Udyam

Are You Micro, Small or Medium?

Instant MSME classification as per the revised MSMED Act criteria (effective July 1, 2020). Enter your investment and turnover to get your category.

🏅 MSME Classification Tool

Revised criteria w.e.f. July 1, 2020 — Investment + Turnover based

Post-2020 amendment: same criteria for both Manufacturing and Service
Original cost, excluding land & building

MSME Criteria Table

w.e.f. July 1, 2020
CategoryInvestmentAnnual Turnover
Micro≤ ₹1 Crore≤ ₹5 Crore
Small≤ ₹10 Crore≤ ₹50 Crore
Medium≤ ₹50 Crore≤ ₹250 Crore
Large (not MSME)> ₹50 Crore> ₹250 Crore
Both criteria apply. Enterprise classified by whichever gives the higher category.

Key MSME Benefits

Govt. of India
BenefitWho Gets It
Collateral-free loans (CGTMSE)Micro & Small
Priority sector bank creditAll MSME
Delayed payment protection (45 days)All MSME
GeM portal registrationAll MSME
MUDRA loan eligibilityMicro

🇮🇳 Income Tax Slabs — New Regime FY 2025-26

Finance Act 2025
Income SlabRateKey Note
Up to ₹3,00,000Nil—
₹3,00,001 – ₹7,00,0005%87A rebate if taxable ≤ ₹12L → zero tax
₹7,00,001 – ₹10,00,00010%—
₹10,00,001 – ₹12,00,00015%—
₹12,00,001 – ₹15,00,00020%—
₹15,00,001 – ₹24,00,00025%New slab added in FA 2025
Above ₹24,00,00030%+ 4% Health & Education Cess
Standard Deduction for Salary: ₹75,000 · Effective zero tax up to ₹12.75L gross salary

🇮🇳 GST 2.0 Rate Structure — Effective 22 September 2025

56th GST Council · Cess Abolished
RateCategoryKey Items
NilExempt goodsFresh produce, milk (UHT), eggs, grains, books, medicines (select), education
3%Precious metalsGold, silver, diamond jewellery
5%Merit goodsPackaged food, most medicines, EVs, agri equipment, tractors, solar
18%StandardElectronics, AC, TV, cement, cars <1200cc/4m, bikes ≤350cc, telecom, IT services
40%Luxury & SinCars >1200cc or >4m, bikes >350cc, tobacco, pan masala, aerated drinks, yachts, aircraft, revolvers
Old 12% and 28% rate slabs abolished. Compensation Cess abolished. New simplified structure: Nil / 5% / 18% / 40%.

Professional Services · New Delhi

Need Expert Help?
LexVanta India is Here.

TaxBro is built and maintained by LexVanta India — a professional tax, compliance and business advisory firm in New Delhi. When the free tool isn't enough, our team is one WhatsApp away.

LexVanta India · Professional Tax & Compliance Advisory
🏢
Company Registration
Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8, Partnership — end-to-end MCA registration with DSC, DIN and PAN/TAN.
📋
GST Registration & Filing
GSTIN registration, GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9 annual return, GST notices and ITC reconciliation.
💰
Income Tax Filing (ITR)
ITR-1 to ITR-6. Salary, business, capital gains, NRI returns. Tax planning and notice response.
📊
TDS Compliance
TDS deduction advisory, 24Q/26Q/27Q filing, Form 16/16A certificates, correction statements.
🏭
MSME / Udyam Registration
Udyam registration, NIC code selection, amendment of registration and certificate download.
📒
Accounting & Bookkeeping
Tally-based monthly bookkeeping, P&L, balance sheet and MIS reports for SMEs and startups.
⚖️
ROC Annual Compliance
AOC-4, MGT-7, DIR-3 KYC, board resolutions, DPT-3 and all MCA annual filing requirements.
🔍
Tax Audit (Form 3CD)
Sec 44AB tax audit, Form 3CA/3CB/3CD preparation as per ICAI standards. Big-4 quality at SME price.
